decisions.rationale: IR re-read confirms bTIrY is the RepeatingGroup parent of cell template ai_RNbBHXSl (bTIre); DashboardCurrentPathCard.tsx renders the active-enrollment cell with correct data-bubble-id on ai_RNbBHXSm/ai_RNbBHXSn/ai_RNbBHXSt but collapses the RG to a single row — intentional React simplification for one active enrollment. criteria_audit AC-2 and functional_audit FV-1 pass; ui_evidence is partial only for the RG wrapper selector, not missing cell content. Matches DASH-02 C-1 / DASH-04 C-2 precedent: add data-bubble-id="bTIrY" on the enrollment wrapper as parity-tooling polish within DASH-05; does not block DASH-06 depends_on.

IR and drsam-99657.bubble confirm ai_RNbBHXSC uses bgcolor var(--color_aiRNbAaxgt_default) and border_roundness 8; DashboardInsightsCard.tsx applies supplemental Tailwind bg-accent/30 rounded-lg atop bubbleStyle(Group_transparent_). DS-01 tokens.css already defines --color_aiRNbAaxgt_default and bubble-styles.css maps it on badge/chip classes. Named ui_refs carry correct data-bubble-id; AC-1/AC-3 and FV-3 pass. ui_evidence partial is presentation delta only — swap to bg-[var(--color_aiRNbAaxgt_default)] or extracted insight-row style is low-priority DS polish per DASH-03 C-2 supplemental-Tailwind precedent; no downstream item requires exact bgcolor before advance.

pathEnrollmentApi.ts returns EMPTY_ENROLLMENT when pathenrollment1 query succeeds with no active row, skipping deriveFromOnboardingData — a latent forward-path bug. Brownfield prototype has no pathenrollment1 migration (coverage preflight, implementation-policy); isSchemaUnavailable always routes to onboarding_data fallback, so FV-1/AC-2 pass in the active runtime. microCommitmentsApi.ts uses the same table-then-fallback shape for schema-missing only. Merge table-miss with onboarding_data when pathenrollment1 schema lands — defer to schema/backend wave per DASH-04 C-1 table-branch precedent; does not block DASH-06.

IR inventory confirms ai_RNbBHXSq (Text under ai_RNbBHXSo) and ai_RNbBHXSt (Group with ai_RNbBHXSv text under ai_RNbBHXSl) are sibling regions in the Bubble hierarchy; both bind current-session title from the enrollment row. DashboardCurrentPathCard.tsx mirrors this: ai_RNbBHXSq renders "Next: {title}" and ai_RNbBHXSt renders the title with ArrowRight — matching Bubble duplicate regions per review finding. Hiding or differentiating ai_RNbBHXSt would reduce ui-fidelity to IR, not improve it. ui_evidence for both nodes passes; AC-2 requires path-next-step ai_RNbBHXSt fed by enrollment binding, satisfied.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, 0 blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. Deferred: C-1 bTIrY RG wrapper data-bubble-id as parity-tooling polish; C-2 insight-row bgcolor var(--color_aiRNbAaxgt_default) vs bg-accent/30 as DS polish; C-3 pathenrollment1 empty-table onboarding_data merge when schema lands. Accepted: C-4 duplicate next-step title in ai_RNbBHXSq and ai_RNbBHXSt as intentional Bubble IR parity.
